item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
just a cool table that i want now.. greetings online friends
perhaps
it's true
it's not that bad
sad
it's free real estate
just gotta jimmy it in there
hmm i wonder what kind they have
that's a lot of space weed
yes i posted this vid before but it had a different title damnit
depends on if in the ocean or not i guess
and hair
foiled again
this is an actual chip that i got the other night
wait have i been doing this wrong?
mmm hmm
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!

Is me
I also would accept a thorough stretching in the rack
Me and my bestie, we see each other in person like twice a year
Boop
Fuck off little dude
We call it existential crisis time
Noooooooo
Pto means Prepare The Others cause I ain't working
My mom's cat Toruk giving zero ducks about our resident chipmunk
My sweet baby Jack
item.dc:creator: Painahimah

item.title: The cutest old man in the world, Kirby
item.description:
This is Kirby, my best friend. Kirby is 8 years old now! As a veterinary student, it is my life goal to make his life as enjoyable and as long as possible. I'd be lost without him. He is the perfect study buddy. As you may notice, Kirby did not approve of his winter shoes.
He has spunk and will tell you how he feels
Blep
Such a dapper gentleman
He knows how to bow
The picture of refinement
Kirby has a healthy respect for cats. Bug secretly loves him
The puppy days!
A young Kirby, very sassy
Who needs personal space?
I call this his army cut. Basically I just trim the scruff up during the summer
Liv the cat doesn't approve of dogs. Thanks for looking at my dog Kirby, the cutest dog in the entire world, just like all dogs.
item.dc:creator: LittleDoveFlight

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1044 (invasive cowboys)
item.description:
It's morning again. The autism has won. Let's get this bread.
Obligatory Discworld reference
Red-bellied Woodpecker
This sounds like something I need to start.
The statue is *actually* a Roman marble copy of an original bronze from Pergemon, made by Greeks.
If I had John Calvin and Arius of Alexandra in a room and two punches to offer, I'd punch John Calvin in the face Twice.
Having worn almost this same exact ensemble in a Northern Arizona snowstorm, I can attest that it is indeed a warm, comfortable, and cozy outfit to wear in a storm.
So this is going to be a fucking magic item somewhere in my campaign now.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Reep."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: It's been a difficult, scary, awesome ride so far
item.description: For all the dumb ass shit I did in my late teens and early 20's, I did pretty good for myself. To date, my 40th birthday was the one that was sad / defeating. I guess that's when I accepted the fact I had to be an adult. Thanks for all the gifs and memes. Looking forward to a lot more if the new Imgur powers that be don't screw it all up. Peace
item.dc:creator: SunAnvil

item.title: The 361st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
For me it would be The Price Is Right, and I spin *that* wheel so hard it makes the studio go back in time and we get Bob Barker back at age 25 (with all the knowledge he had when he died at 99) for another 60+ years of TV hosting. With him would come back the good days of TV Game Shows, innocent and fun.
So apparently this doesn't work if you also describe what you're exactly like this.
▲ @CodyBurkett ▼
@ Everyone
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
▲ @PotatoCheesMonk ▼
@HileyNoteson
Lookin at you, Cucker Tarlson
This was the Vancouver Orpheum
Mood
Call a Bondulance
MY CABBAGES! I mean laundry!
Why, tho? Why airbrush it out?
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Not sure if it's a trap
item.dc:creator: one212

item.title: 6 years ago Imgur came to my rescue. . .
item.description:
6 years ago I was a single mom escaping a horrible situation with a sick newborn baby. I didn't have enough money to afford food for myself or the heating bill, let alone paying for Christmas presents. I felt like such a failure and vented to the void. A bunch of Imgurians pulled through and sent my son gifts to make his first Christmas a great one
6 years later, my boy is growing up and we are in a much better place now. We are thriving! Each year we give back a little but this year we went all out and filled every Toys for Tots box in our area. Every one we came across was empty and we filled them to overflowing or close to it. Thank you Imgurians for what you guys did for us! It hasn't been forgotten and we plan to continue to pay it forward!
Sleepy kitty tax. Her name is Mittens
item.dc:creator: McFluffySundae

item.title: The Giant Alaskan Malamute is a selectively bred Malamute that exceeds 70 kg in weight and 70 cm of height, originally bred to pull heavy goods between cities throughout Alaska. They have been recorded to pull loads up to 500 kg…
item.dc:creator: aerrorfree
